dapper.ex: He looked very dapper in his new suit.

dapple.def: 斑點、使起斑點的人的人人物 (單數) (斑)
dapple.ex: Soft light began to dapple the floor.

dappled.def: 有斑點的、斑駁的人的人 (或物) (斑)
dappled.ex: The path was lit by dappled sunlight.

dare.def: 敢、挑戰、膽敢的人的人人物 (單數) (敢)
dare.col: how dare you, i dare say, truth or dare
dare.ex: How dare you speak to me like that?

daredevil.def: 冒失鬼、蠻幹的人人物 (單數) (敢)
daredevil.ex: He is a fearless local daredevil.

daring.def: 大膽的、勇敢的人 (或物) (勇)
daring.ex: The soldiers made a daring escape.

daringly.ex: She was dressed daringly for the ball.

dark.def: 黑暗的、深色的、無知的、幽暗的人的人人物 (單數) (暗)
dark.col: after dark, dark horse (黑馬), in the_dark
dark.ex: We are still kept in the_dark about it.

darken.def: 弄黑、變暗、使憂鬱的人的人
darken.ex: Clouds began to darken the_sky tonight.

darkener.ex: She used a local hair darkener today.

darkish.ex: She has very long and darkish hair.

darkly.ex: He suggested darkly that he knew all.

darkness.def: 黑暗、陰暗的人物 (單數) (暗)
darkness.ex: The_room was in total darkness now.

darling.def: 親愛的、受寵的人的人物 (單數) (親)
darling.ex: Oh my darling, I missed you so much.

darn.def: 織補、補綴、(口)一點點的人的人人物 (單數) (補)
darn.ex: She sat down to darn an old sock.

dart.def: 飛鏢、疾馳、投擲的人的人人物 (單數) (鏢/疾)
dart.ex: The_mouse made a dart for the_hole.

dashboard.ex: The_fuel light on the_dashboard is on.

dashing.def: 時髦的、充滿活力的的人 (或物) (帥)
dashing.ex: He is a very dashing and brave man.

dastard.def: 卑鄙的人、膽小鬼人物 (單數) (卑)
dastard.ex: He was called a vile and low dastard.

data.def: 數據、資料人物 (複數使用) (數)
data.col: raw data, data processing, database, personal data
data.ex: We need to collect more raw data now.

databank/data-bank.def: 數據庫、資料庫人物 (單數) (庫)
databank/data-bank.ex: The_data was stored in a databank.

database.def: 資料庫、數據庫人物 (單數) (庫)

datable/dateable.def: 可確定年代的人的人物 (單數) (年)
datable/dateable.ex: The_old pot is clearly datable to 100.

date.def: 日期、約會、時代、鑑定年代的人的人人物 (單數) (日/約)
date.col: to date (迄今), blind date, up to date, out of date
date.ex: I have an important blind date tonight.

dated.def: 陈舊的、過時的人的人 (或物) (舊)
dated.ex: The_room looked rather old and dated.

dateless.def: 無日期的、永恆的的人的人人物 (單數) (永)
dateless.ex: She has a very rare and dateless beauty.

dateline.def: 日期欄、國際換日線人物 (單數) (線)

dating.def: 約會、標明日期的人 (或物) (約)
dating.ex: They met through a local dating agency.

dative.def: (語)與格的、(律)任命的人的人物 (單數) (與)
dative.ex: The_word is in the_dative case tonight.

datum.def: 數據、資料的人物 (單數) (數)
datum.ex: Not a single datum was lost in crash.

daub.def: 塗抹、亂畫、粗泥的人的人人物 (單數) (抹)
daub.ex: They began to daub the_wall with mud.

daughter.ex: She is the_only daughter of the_king.

daughterly.def: 女兒般的、孝順的人的人物 (孝)
daughterly.ex: She fulfilled all her daughterly duties.

daunt.def: 威嚇、使氣餒、使畏縮的人的人
daunt.ex: The_task manage to daunt his spirit.

daunting.def: 使人氣餒的、艱鉅的人 (或物) (難)
daunting.ex: Climbing Everest is a daunting task.

dauntless.def: 勇敢的、無畏的人的人物 (勇)
dauntless.ex: He showed great and dauntless courage.

dauphin.ex: The_young dauphin was heir to throne.

davenport.def: 長沙發、小書桌人物 (單數) (發/桌)
davenport.ex: He slept on a comfy davenport tonight.

davit.ex: The_crew used the_davit to lower boat.

daw.ex: The_black daw sat on the_old castle wall.

dawdle.def: 閒混、遊蕩、偷懶的人的人
dawdle.ex: Don't dawdle along the_way to school.

dawdler.def: 遊蕩者、偷懶的人人物 (單數) (懶)
dawdler.ex: The_boy is a hopeless local dawdler.

dawn.def: 黎明、開始、破曉的人的人人物 (單數) (黎)
dawn.col: dawn on (明白), at dawn, crack of dawn
dawn.ex: It finally began to dawn on me today.

dawning.ex: We see the_dawning of a new local era.

day.def: 日子、白天、時代、全盛時期人物 (單數) (日)
day.col: save the_day, carry the_day (獲勝), day by day, call it a day
day.ex: I'm tired, so let's call it a day now.

day-bed.def: 日間休息用的長沙發人物 (單數) (發)
day-bed.ex: She lay on the_soft day-bed to rest.

daybook.def: 日記簿、流水帳人物 (單數) (帳)
daybook.ex: He wrote his expenses in the_daybook.

daybreak.ex: They set off for the_hills at daybreak.

daycare/day-care.def: 日間託管、日間護理人物 (單數) (託)
daycare/day-care.ex: The_baby is at the_local daycare center.

daydream.def: 白日夢、空想的人物、做白日夢的人的人人物 (單數) (夢)
daydream.ex: He sat at his desk lost in a daydream.

daydreamer.def: 做白日夢者人物 (單數) (夢)
daydreamer.ex: He is a hopeless and constant dreamer.

day-labourer.def: 散工、計日工人物 (單數) (工)

daylight.def: 日光、白晝、公開、豁然開悟的人的人物、曝光的人的人人物 (單數) (光)
daylight.col: daylight robbery (敲詐), in broad daylight

dayly.def: 每日的、日常的人物 (單數) (日)
dayly.ex: Give us this day our dayly bread.

dayroom.def: 日間休息室人物 (單數) (室)

days.def: 日子、時代、天天人物 (複數使用) (日)
days.ex: In those days, we had no local phones.

daysman.def: 仲裁者、調解人人物 (單數) (和)

daystar.def: 啟明星、晨星、太陽人物 (單數) (星)

daytime.ex: He sleeps in the_daytime and works.

daywork.def: 日間工作、散工人物 (單數) (工)

daze.def: 眩暈、茫然的人物、使眩暈的人的人人物 (單數) (眩)
daze.ex: The_news left him in a complete daze.
